zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham於1550年1月6日出生在英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆時，他的父親Nicholas Bushnell26歲，母親Elizabeth Baskerville22歲。他於1575年與Margery在英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1625年8月15日在英國波克夏塔其哈姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham于1550年1月6日出生在英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆时，他的父亲Nicholas Bushnell26岁，母亲Elizabeth Baskerville22岁。他于1575年与Margery在英国英格兰波克夏塔其哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1625年8月15日在英国波克夏塔其哈姆享年75岁，埋葬在英国波克夏塔其哈姆聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham was born on 6 January 1550, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Bushnell, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Baskerville, was 22. He married Margery in 1575, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 August 1625, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham est né le 6 janvier 1550, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Bushnell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Baskerville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery en 1575, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 août 1625, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatchamが1550年1月6日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで生まれた時，父Nicholas Bushnellは26歳，母Elizabeth Baskervilleは22歳であった。1575年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムでMargeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1625年8月15日にイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで75歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, E: 영국 버크실르 댓챔 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham(이)가 1550년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 댓챔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Bushnell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Baskerville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 댓챔에서 Margery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1625년 8월 15일 영국 버크실르 댓챔에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 댓챔 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1550, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Bushnell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Baskerville, tinha 22 anos. ru.St Mary's Church, Thatcham, Berkshire, E: ст мэри'с чурч, тачам, биркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Bushnell Sr of Thatcham родился 6 января 1550 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Bushnell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Baskerville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery в 1575 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 августа 1625 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, тачам, биркшир, Англия.
